title: [kimi-review] 1dd79e1: [SEVERITY: medium] Empty commit: the message claims to fix b
description:
Commit: 1dd79e11c
Message: fix(coap): bounds checking in CBOR status encoders

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] Empty commit: the message claims to fix bounds checking in CBOR status encoders, but the diff shows zero modifications. Either the fix was never actually committed, it was lost during a rebase/amend, or it duplicates an earlier change. If merged as-is, the bounds-checking bug it claims to fix would still be present. Verify the intended changes exist elsewhere before relying on this commit.
